tests.purpose: pinned WAD identity, E1M1 confinement and literal placed thing/special sets
all 114 wall textures and 44 flats are closure roots and resolve through texture/patch provenance
all 49 placed types have known, source-backed definitions and spawn states
five interactive monster types close through perception, attack, pain, death, drop, sprite and sound behavior
all eight linedef and four sector specials have independently documented exact trigger/action semantics
starter and five placed weapons resolve ready/fire/refire/flash states, ammo, projectiles and sound
all 17 placed pickup types define bounded effects, consumption and pickup sound
every reachable state transition resolves with bounded termination/cycles and valid sprite/sound/action references
required sprite prefixes, frames and rotations resolve to pinned WAD lumps
required gameplay sounds and E1M1/intermission music are present and closure-reachable
title, menu, pause, HUD, font/key/face and E1M1 intermission assets are present and closure-reachable
E1M1 nukage, water and wall-fall animation groups have exact ordered frames and timing
checked-in project RNG has 256 exact independently derived bytes, persisted-cursor metadata and is not Doom P_Random
every behavior row cites allowed public behavior/spec sources and Freedoom data provenance without copied GPL code/data
canonical files are byte-stable, duplicate-free and contain no unknown/TODO/volatile fields
twelve semantic mutations map to and are killed by named visible tests
